titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 679

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=71 status=reviewed modified=2023-06-02 13:02:56.769436+00 | translation moa=72 status=reviewed modified=2023-06-02 13:02:56.759571+00

div.p:
Omnibus x͞pi fidelibus has literas videntibus vel audientibus . Rad’ Prior ⁊ conuentus Dunelm’ ecclesie
Salutem In domino. Noueritis nos concessisse ⁊ hac presenti carta nostra confirmasse dilecto amico nostro . Domino . W .
De Bondington’ . Cancellario . Scott’ . maritagium heredis Galfridi Ridel . ⁊ custodiam terre eiusdem
heredis In uilla de Flamington’ . donec dictus . heres ad legitomam peruenerit etatem ⁊ In huius rei
testimonium sigillum capituli nostri huic scripto appossuimus .

p.cl: To all Christ’s faithful who see or hear these letters, Ralph the Prior, and the convent of the church of Durham, send greeting in the Lord.

Know that we have granted and by this our present charter have made firm to our beloved friend, the lord W(illiam) of Bondington, Chancellor of the Scots, the marriage of the heir of Geoffrey Ridel, and the guardianship of the land of the same heir in the toun of Flemington, until the said heir shall have reached the legal age.
And in testimony of this matter we have applied the seal of our chapter to this written deed.
